fields.summary: LocalityMulticastAMRMProxyPolicy should fallback to random sub-cluster when cannot resolve resource

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: Right now in LocalityMulticastAMRMProxyPolicy, whenever we cannot resolve the resource name (node or rack), we always route the request to home sub-cluster. However, home sub-cluster might not be always be ready to use (timed out YARN-8581) or enabled (by AMRMProxyPolicy weights). It might also be overwhelmed by the requests if sub-cluster resolver has some issue. In this Jira, we are changing it to pick a random active and enabled sub-cluster for resource request we cannot resolve.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
